subcodes.first_line: O servant at the Threshold of the Beloved! In this moment, as I am immersed in remembrance of thee and am yearning for the meeting of the friends [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده آستان حضرت دوست در ایندم که همدم ذکر و یاد توام و مشتاق دیدار یاران
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation
